description_long: This is a three-seater booth-style sofa with a high, straight backrest and a solid, dark wood base. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a rich, reddish-brown leather or leather-like material, with the backrest featuring vertically channeled padding for added comfort and visual interest. The seat is divided into three distinct, equally sized sections, each with a smooth, slightly rounded cushion. The sofa lacks armrests, giving it a streamlined, space-efficient profile suitable for public or commercial settings such as diners, cafes, or waiting areas. The base and back panel are constructed from a dark wood or wood-like material, providing a sturdy and stable foundation. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on durability and easy maintenance.
description: A booth-style, three-seater sofa with a high, channeled backrest and smooth, reddish-brown leather upholstery, set on a solid dark wood base. The design is modern, armless, and suitable for public or commercial spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three smooth seat cushions and a vertically channeled, high backrest with no armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the solid, dark wood base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the dark wood back panel, with no visible upholstery or detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's profile, seat depth, and the continuous wood base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, equally sized seat cushions and a single high backrest with vertical channeling; all cushions are uniform and fixed in place.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; the sofa has an open-ended, armless design for easy access from either side.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the sofa sits on a continuous, recessed dark wood base that runs the full length and depth of the piece.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with vertical channel tufting; fully upholstered and integrated with the base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid reddish-brown upholstery with a smooth finish on the seat and vertically channeled padding on the backrest; no decorative stitching or additional patterns.
